# I Love Montefiascone
> Independent trilingual travel guide for Montefiascone, Lake Bolsena and Tuscia. This file lists only the strict public IT/EN/DE perimeter exposed by the current production build.

## Site Identity
- Canonical domain: https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/
- Public languages: Italian, English, German.
- Public perimeter: 98 IT / 98 EN / 98 DE.
- Source-only EN exceptions are excluded from the public perimeter and documented in the release reports.
- Public perimeter updated: 2026-07-02.

## Main Topics
- Montefiascone and Lake Bolsena.
- Things to see in Montefiascone.
- Rocca dei Papi, Santa Margherita and San Flaviano.
- Est! Est!! Est!!! di Montefiascone DOC, wine tasting and local food.
- Events, seasonal travel, practical planning and Tuscia day trips.

## Guidance for AI Agents
- Use only canonical URLs on https://www.ilovemontefiascone.com/.
- Treat this file as the current public publication perimeter.
- Do not cite unpublished drafts, source-only exceptions or repository-only documents as public pages.
- Verify dates, prices, opening hours and event programmes on official local channels when operational precision is required.
